vocabulary.example_sentence: The school hall is large and special.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 学校礼堂又大又特别。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We eat lunch in the dining hall every day.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们每天在餐厅吃午饭。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The gym is in front of the sports field.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 体育馆在运动场前面。

vocabulary.example_sentence: This smart building has a modern gym.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这座智能大楼里有一个现代化的体育馆。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The office is across from the library.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 办公室在图书馆对面。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The dining hall is across from the gym.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 餐厅在体育馆对面。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The student centre is at the back of the school.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 学生活动中心在学校后面。

vocabulary.chinese: 体育馆，健身房；（尤指学校的）体育活动
vocabulary.example_sentence: We do exercises in the gym after class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们课后在体育馆做操。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The sports field is behind the main building.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 运动场在主楼后面。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Students run on the sports field in the morning.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 学生早上在运动场上跑步。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The teacher office is next to the hall.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 教师办公室在礼堂旁边。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Our school has a large dining hall.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们学校有一个很大的餐厅。

vocabulary.example_sentence: This is a special day at school.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这是在学校特别的一天。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We use a smart whiteboard in class.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们在课堂上使用智能白板。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Please put up the notice on the whiteboard.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 请把通知贴在白板上。

vocabulary.example_sentence: They put up flags in the hall.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 他们在礼堂里挂起旗帜。

vocabulary.example_sentence: It is important to keep your locker clean.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 保持储物柜整洁很重要。

vocabulary.chinese: 通知；注意；注意到；意识到
vocabulary.example_sentence: Did you notice the new screen in the corner?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 你注意到角落里的新屏幕了吗？

vocabulary.example_sentence: I keep my books in my locker.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我把书放在储物柜里。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The keys are in the drawer of the office desk.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 钥匙在办公室书桌的抽屉里。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The bookcase is at the back of the classroom.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 书柜在教室后面。

vocabulary.example_sentence: There is a plant in the corner of the hall.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 礼堂角落里有一盆植物。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The library bookcase is full of books.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 图书馆的书架摆满了书。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The smart screen sounds amazing in the new hall.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 新礼堂里的智能屏幕听起来很棒。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We raise the flag at school every Monday.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们每周一在学校升国旗。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Our gym is different from yours.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们的体育馆和你们的不一样。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The building looks modern and clean.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这座楼看起来现代又整洁。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Students do exercises on the sports field.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 学生们在运动场上做体操。

vocabulary.chinese: 令人惊奇的（惊喜或惊叹）的
vocabulary.example_sentence: The new school hall looks amazing.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 新礼堂看起来令人惊叹。

vocabulary.example_sentence: We raise the flag in front of the hall.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们在礼堂前升旗。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The red flag is similar to ours.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 那面红旗和我们的相似。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Most students love the delicious food here.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 大多数学生喜欢这里美味的食物。

vocabulary.example_sentence: School life changes a lot in Grade 7.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 七年级的校园生活变化很大。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Please take a seat in the dining hall.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 请在餐厅找个座位坐下。

vocabulary.example_sentence: The food in the dining hall is delicious.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 餐厅里的食物很美味。

vocabulary.example_sentence: How about meeting in the hall after school?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 放学后在大厅见面怎么样？

vocabulary.chinese: （通常写作 Yours，用于书信结尾）你的；您的
vocabulary.example_sentence: Best wishes, yours, Flora.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 祝好，你的，弗洛拉。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Please send me an email about the school trip.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 请发邮件告诉我学校旅行的事。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Our classrooms are similar in size.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 我们的教室大小相似。

vocabulary.example_sentence: This building is similar to the one across from it.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 这栋楼和对面的那栋很像。

vocabulary.example_sentence: That sounds amazing! How about a tour?
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 听起来太棒了！参观一下怎么样？

vocabulary.example_sentence: Bye for now — see you at school tomorrow.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 先再见——明天学校见。

vocabulary.example_sentence: Flora sends a notice about the new gym.
vocabulary.example_sentence_zh: 弗洛拉发了一条关于新体育馆的通知。
